# BlackPaws website generated by claude code

We tried to generate the site in this [Figma](https://www.figma.com/design/kFwYoP3aLERY35XUNRK1WS/%F0%9F%90%BE-Site-Blackpaws) with Claude code

The result is in [blackpaws-site folder](./blackpaws-site)

We also tried to generate the site with Figma make, you can find it here: TBD

## How to launch the project

In github page type `.`, this wiil open the online editor.

Then in terminal type:

```sh
cd blackpaws-site
npm install
npm run dev
```
